decision: use full_gemma_teacher_topk_kl_v1 for P14-6 subset proof

p14_6_subset_scope.minimum_heldout_scope: predeclared full-teacher heldout subset with baseline/candidate before-after comparison
p14_6_subset_scope.minimum_train_scope: predeclared full-teacher train subset sufficient for a thermally bounded phone-local proof
not_allowed: host or RunPod runtime data-path substitution
long segmented phone run before the short proof passes

scaled_generation.reason: CPU-only clean RunPod completed an 8-sequence shard in 471 seconds; serial generation for 1024 train plus 128 heldout shards projects to about 150.72 hours.
scaled_generation.requirement_to_promote_full_scale: complete the offline full-teacher shard generation campaign with compact manifests and no repository payloads, or provision a faster validated oracle.
